description: Lead scoring rules v2 for CWDB Phase 2 (construction-first). Applies to ALL lead channels (webform, phone, manual), not just form submissions. Scores persist in the warehouse side table lead_scores (schema/016), which the nightly HubSpot pull never touches. Docs: operations/leads/lead-scoring.md

dimensions.name: drive_time
dimensions.rule: Drive time from CWDB Wausau (906 N 16th Ave, Wausau WI 54401)

dimensions.name: budget
dimensions.note: under-10k is NOT a weak signal for repair/stain: the self-perform cwdb lane profitably serves sub-10k jobs (Overbeck $2,800). Flag for review only if budget under $5,000 on a build.

dimensions.name: project_fit
dimensions.note: Repair/stain close to home outranks bigger builds right now: cwdb lane can self-perform immediately (no permit, no DSPS gate).

D.meaning: Weak or data-incomplete; qualify by phone, do not drive

outer_60_plus.note: Outside working radius in Phase 2. Politely decline or refer; do not book.

unknown.note: Rural fire-number addresses without a city: resolve the drive time on the qualification call before booking anything.

repair_stain_inner_30.detail: The Overbeck playbook. Repair/stain within 30 min of Wausau: call, book the walk-through for THIS WEEK, self-perform on the cwdb lane (combined estimate + work order, no permit needed).

new_build_any_tier.detail: New builds and structural replacements: book the walk-through NOW to hold the lead, deliver the estimate, but close (prime contract + deposit) only after DSPS Dwelling Contractor cert. Pre-license, builder lane rules apply: CWDB never signs as prime or takes a build deposit.

mid_40_60_any_project.detail: 40-60 min out (Stevens Point etc.): phone-qualify FIRST (confirm scope, budget, ownership, seriousness), then batch multiple walk-throughs into one trip. Never drive an hour for a single unqualified lead.

auto_disqualify_conditions: Non-deck project outside CWDB scope (e.g. whole-home construction)
consent_rule: consent_missing = true NEVER hides or deprioritizes a lead. It blocks SMS only. Call the lead, capture verbal TCPA consent with the scripted ask, log tcpa_consent_source = verbal in HubSpot.
